samples.text: An inquiry follows into the objects of spiritual thoughts; which are, — 1. The dispensations of Providence; 2. Special trials and temptations; and 3. Heavenly and eternal realities. In regard to the latter, —

An inquiry follows into the objects of spiritual thoughts; which are, — 1. The dispensations of Providence; 2. Special trials and temptations; and 3. Heavenly and eternal realities. In regard to the latter, —

It is the spiritual mind alone that can reconcile those things which are prescribed to us as our duty towards God. "To delight and rejoice in him always, to triumph in the remembrance of him, to draw nigh unto him with boldness and confidence," are on the one
